overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in futuristic spacesuit armor exploring a dark, industrial sci-fi corridor system. The character moves through circular doorways connecting storage rooms, maintenance tunnels, and laboratory areas with metallic architecture and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: spaceship storage room connecting to corridor

events.description: character walks through the first circular archway into the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the storage area toward the circular doorway

entered.detail: yellow metal tool cabinet with multiple drawers visible in the starting room
large white cylindrical storage tank with lid
large circular metal doorway frame leading to the corridor
metal grate flooring with geometric pattern

segments.scene_description: The character begins in a storage room with a yellow tool cabinet and white container visible on the left. Walking forward through a circular archway, the scene transitions into a narrow metallic corridor with artificial overhead lighting.

events.description: entering rough-walled tunnel section with different texture and dimmer lighting
approaching brighter exit at the end of the dark tunnel

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the dimly lit tunnel with rough walls

entered.detail: rough textured walls resembling rock or unfinished concrete with industrial piping
small rectangular lights embedded in the floor along the right side

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker maintenance tunnel with rough hewn walls and industrial piping. Small floor lights illuminate the path as the character moves toward a brighter exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: cargo storage corridor with stacked containers

events.description: exiting dark tunnel into cleaner corridor with smooth metal walls
passing by stacked cargo containers on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking through the clean corridor passing storage containers

entered.detail: clean smooth metal wall panels with industrial rivets and seams
stacks of rectangular metal cargo containers and crates
long rectangular fluorescent light fixtures on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: Exiting the dark tunnel, the character enters a well-lit corridor with smooth metal walls. Stacked cargo containers line the right side while overhead fluorescent lights illuminate the path forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: laboratory or office entrance with white furniture

events.description: approaching laboratory area with white desks and glass partitions visible ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the end of the corridor and entering the laboratory room

entered.detail: white laboratory counters and desk surfaces with clean sterile appearance
transparent glass partitions dividing the laboratory space
bright overhead lighting panels illuminating the laboratory area

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the end of the corridor where a laboratory space opens up, featuring white counters, glass partitions, and brighter overhead lighting visible through the final archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a series of industrial spaces that transition from a cluttered storage area into a bright, sterile laboratory. It begins in a storage room beside a yellow tool cabinet and white container, moving forward through a circular archway into a narrow metallic corridor. As the character progresses, the environment shifts into a darker maintenance tunnel characterized by rough-hewn walls and industrial piping, with small floor lights guiding the way toward a distant glow. The scene then opens into a well-lit corridor with smooth metal walls and stacked cargo containers before finally passing through a final archway into a laboratory space featuring white counters and glass partitions under bright overhead lighting.
